channel.title: math.KT updates on arXiv.org
channel.description: math.KT updates on the arXiv.org e-print archive.

item.title: Quantum cellular automata are a coarse homology theory
item.description: arXiv:2603.10501v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We show that quantum cellular automata naturally form the degree-zero part of a coarse homology theory. The recent result of Ji and Yang that the space of QCA forms an Omega-spectrum in the sense of algebraic topology is a direct consequence of the formal properties of coarse homology theories.
item.dc:creator: Matthias Ludewig

item.title: The stable uniqueness theorem for unitary tensor category equivariant KK-theory
item.description: arXiv:2410.23935v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: We introduce the Cuntz-Thomsen picture of $\mathcal{C}$-equivariant Kasparov theory, denoted $\mathrm{KK}^\mathcal{C}$, for a unitary tensor category $\mathcal{C}$ with countably many isomorphism classes of simple objects. We use this description of $\mathrm{KK}^\mathcal{C}$ to prove the stable uniqueness theorem in this setting.
item.dc:creator: Sergio Gir\'on Pacheco, Kan Kitamura, Robert Neagu
